user	prompt	hello agent
agent	response	hi, how can I help
user	prompt	read file foo.txt
agent	tool_result	contents of foo.txt
system	prompt	[Reminder] You have 3 tasks pending
agent	response	ok, I see the reminder

COUNT_REAL_USER
COUNT_MODEL_INPUT
COUNT_BILLABLE
AUDIT_AUTHOR 5
REBUILD_CONVERSATION
